languages.text: {n}В конце концов пирамида ксеносов рухнула вниз, объятая горящими корнями. И лишь тогда стал ясен ее колоссальный масштаб. Победа в битве осталась за человечеством. Остался лишь один вопрос — была ли выиграна война за Зарков.{/n}

{n}In the end, the xenos pyramid came tumbling down, strangled by burning roots. Only then did its colossal scale become known. Humanity had won this battle. The only question that remained was whether Humanity had won the war for Zarkov as well.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}В конце концов пирамида ксеносов рухнула вниз, объятая горящими корнями. И лишь тогда стал ясен ее колоссальный масштаб. Победа в битве осталась за человечеством. Остался лишь один вопрос — была ли выиграна война за Зарков.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}In the end, the xenos pyramid came tumbling down, strangled by burning roots. Only then did its colossal scale become known. Humanity had won this battle. The only question that remained was whether Humanity had won the war for Zarkov as well.{/n}

{n}In the end, the xenos pyramid came tumbling down, strangled by burning roots. Only then did its colossal scale become known. Humanity had won this battle. The only question that remained was whether Humanity had won the war for Zarkov as well.{/n}

{n}In the end, the xenos pyramid came tumbling down, strangled by burning roots. Only then did its colossal scale become known. Humanity had won this battle. The only question that remained was whether Humanity had won the war for Zarkov as well.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ついに、根を燃やして巨大な異星人のピラミッドを倒した。その巨大な規模は、初めて知られた。人類は、この戦いに勝利した。しかし、ザルコフの戦いは、まだ終わっていなかった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the end, the xenos pyramid came tumbling down, strangled by burning roots. Only then did its colossal scale become known. Humanity had won this battle. The only question that remained was whether Humanity had won the war for Zarkov as well.{/n}

traits.locale_text: ついに、根を燃やして巨大な異星人のピラミッドを倒した。その巨大な規模は、初めて知られた。人類は、この戦いに勝利した。しかし、ザルコフの戦いは、まだ終わっていなかった。

languages.text: {n}Al final, la pirámide xenos se desmoronó, estrangulada por las raíces ardientes. Solo entonces quedó clara su inmensidad. La Humanidad había ganado la batalla. Solo quedaba saber si había ganado la guerra por Zarkov.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the end, the xenos pyramid came tumbling down, strangled by burning roots. Only then did its colossal scale become known. Humanity had won this battle. The only question that remained was whether Humanity had won the war for Zarkov as well.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Al final, la pirámide xenos se desmoronó, estrangulada por las raíces ardientes. Solo entonces quedó clara su inmensidad. La Humanidad había ganado la batalla. Solo quedaba saber si había ganado la guerra por Zarkov.{/n}

languages.text: {n}终于，异形金字塔在燃烧根系的绞杀下轰然坍塌。其庞大全貌，直至此刻才惊鸿一现。人类赢得了这场战斗，只剩下一个问题：人类也赢下了整个扎尔科夫吗？{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the end, the xenos pyramid came tumbling down, strangled by burning roots. Only then did its colossal scale become known. Humanity had won this battle. The only question that remained was whether Humanity had won the war for Zarkov as well.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}终于，异形金字塔在燃烧根系的绞杀下轰然坍塌。其庞大全貌，直至此刻才惊鸿一现。人类赢得了这场战斗，只剩下一个问题：人类也赢下了整个扎尔科夫吗？{/n}

languages.text: {n}Am Ende stürzte die Xenospyramide ein und begrub die brennenden Wurzeln unter sich. Erst jetzt zeigten sich ihre kolossalen Ausmaße. Die Menschheit hatte diese Schlacht gewonnen. Nun stellte sich nur noch die Frage, ob die Menschheit auch den Krieg um Zarkov gewonnen hatte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the end, the xenos pyramid came tumbling down, strangled by burning roots. Only then did its colossal scale become known. Humanity had won this battle. The only question that remained was whether Humanity had won the war for Zarkov as well.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Am Ende stürzte die Xenospyramide ein und begrub die brennenden Wurzeln unter sich. Erst jetzt zeigten sich ihre kolossalen Ausmaße. Die Menschheit hatte diese Schlacht gewonnen. Nun stellte sich nur noch die Frage, ob die Menschheit auch den Krieg um Zarkov gewonnen hatte.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sonunda, yanan köklerin boğduğu zeno piramidi yıkıldı. Devasa ölçeği ancak o zaman anlaşıldı. İnsanlık bu savaşı kazanmıştı. Geriye kalan tek belirsizlik, İnsanlığın Zarkov savaşını da kazanıp kazanmadığıydı.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the end, the xenos pyramid came tumbling down, strangled by burning roots. Only then did its colossal scale become known. Humanity had won this battle. The only question that remained was whether Humanity had won the war for Zarkov as well.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sonunda, yanan köklerin boğduğu zeno piramidi yıkıldı. Devasa ölçeği ancak o zaman anlaşıldı. İnsanlık bu savaşı kazanmıştı. Geriye kalan tek belirsizlik, İnsanlığın Zarkov savaşını da kazanıp kazanmadığıydı.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La pyramide xénos, étranglée par les racines enflammées, finit par s'effondrer. Ce fut seulement à cet instant que l'on put constater son immensité. L'humanité avait remporté une bataille. Restait à savoir si elle avait également remporté la guerre pour Zarkov.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the end, the xenos pyramid came tumbling down, strangled by burning roots. Only then did its colossal scale become known. Humanity had won this battle. The only question that remained was whether Humanity had won the war for Zarkov as well.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La pyramide xénos, étranglée par les racines enflammées, finit par s'effondrer. Ce fut seulement à cet instant que l'on put constater son immensité. L'humanité avait remporté une bataille. Restait à savoir si elle avait également remporté la guerre pour Zarkov.{/n}
